title: FORCe step-down-and-pivot biomechanical dataset
author: La Trobe Sports & Exercise Medicine Research Centre
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Copyright (c) 2023 by La Trobe University  
 This work is licensed under CC BY 4.0. 
 ---------------------------------------- 
 Correspondence: Prasanna Sritharan, p.sritharan@latrobe.edu.au 
 Biomechanical data for the step-down-and-pivot task underaken as part of the FORCe project at the La Trobe Sports & Exercise Medicine Research Centre, La Trobe University, Victoria, Australia. 
 
 Experimental joint angles and joint moment data for the step-down-and-pivot task.  
 Relevant participant demographic data is provided. 
 All valid participants and trials provided. 
 All participants are fully de-identified. 
 Joint angles are provided in degrees, and joint moments normalised to % of body weight * height. 
 All trials resamples to 101 time steps, with a time vector provided. 
 
 Any use of this data must cite this dataset and the following published work: 
 
 La Trobe Sports & Exercise Medicine Research Centre. (2024). FORCe step-down-and-pivot biomechanical dataset [Data set]. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.10556255 
 Crossley K, Pandy MG, Majumdar S, Smith AJ, Semciw AI, Kemp JL, Heerey JJ, King MG, Lawrenson PR, Lin YC, Souza RB. Femoroacetabular impingement and hip OsteoaRthritis Cohort (FORCe): protocol for a prospective study. Journal of Physiotherapy. 2017 Jan 1.  https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jphys.2017.10.004
